display.purpose: Page-level headings. Used once per screen.

headline.purpose: Card headers and list section titles.

body.purpose: Main content at 14px. Compact but readable.

label.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, help text, badge content.

mono.purpose: Code blocks and agent chat message content.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Cards, table wrappers, inputs. Default surface state.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Clickable cards and stats on hover.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Modals and toasts floating above the page.

motion.name: ease-colors
motion.purpose: Color transitions on buttons, links, badges.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Calm Blue background, white text, rounded-lg.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-accent-600); color: white; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; transition: background-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-accent-700); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-500); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Gray border, transparent background, darkens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(45% 0.01 265); padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-gray-50); color: oklch(38% 0.01 265); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-500); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No border, transparent background, subtle hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(55% 0.01 265); padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-gray-100); color: oklch(45% 0.01 265); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-500); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard surface container with thin border and rest shadow.
components.html:
Documents to review

  • Invoice #104212/05/2026
components.css: .ds-card { background: white; border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-200); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 24px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-heading { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(25% 0.01 265); margin: 0 0 16px 0; } .ds-card-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-card-list-item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-gray-100); } .ds-card-list-item:first-child { border-top: none; padding-top: 0; } .ds-card-list-item a { color: var(--color-accent-600); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-list-item a:hover { color: var(--color-accent-700); } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: oklch(55% 0.01 265); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with crisp focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(45% 0.01 265); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300); border-radius: 8px; background: white; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--color-accent-500); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--color-accent-500); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-gray-400); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status indicator. Shown in accent variant.
components.html: Approved High priority Draft
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-accent { background: var(--color-accent-100); color: var(--color-accent-700); } .ds-badge-danger { background: var(--color-red-100); color: var(--color-red-700); } .ds-badge-neutral { background: var(--color-gray-100); color: oklch(55% 0.01 265); } .ds-badge-success { background: var(--color-green-100); color: var(--color-green-700); } .ds-badge-warning { background: var(--color-yellow-100); color: var(--color-yellow-700); }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact metric display with colored left accent and value/label pair.
components.css: .ds-stat { display: block; background: white; border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-200); border-left: 4px solid var(--color-gray-300); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); text-decoration: none; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 200ms; } a.ds-stat:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-stat-info { border-left-color: var(--color-blue-500); } .ds-stat-danger { border-left-color: var(--color-red-500); } .ds-stat-success { border-left-color: var(--color-green-500); } .ds-stat-attention { border-left-color: oklch(62% 0.18 48); } .ds-stat-value { display: block; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(25% 0.01 265); } .ds-stat-info .ds-stat-value { color: var(--color-blue-700); } .ds-stat-danger .ds-stat-value { color: var(--color-red-700); } .ds-stat-success .ds-stat-value { color: var(--color-green-700); } .ds-stat-attention .ds-stat-value { color: oklch(52% 0.16 42); } .ds-stat-label { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(55% 0.01 265); margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Checkbox-based toggle switch with smooth knob transition.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-toggle-input { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); } .ds-toggle-track { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 36px; height: 20px; background: var(--color-gray-200); border-radius: 9999px; transition: background-color 150ms; } .ds-toggle-input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: var(--color-accent-600); } .ds-toggle-input:focus-visible + .ds-toggle-track { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-300); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-toggle-input:disabled + .ds-toggle-track { opacity: 0.5; } .ds-toggle-knob { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 16px; height: 16px; background: white; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); transition: transform 200ms; } .ds-toggle-input:checked + .ds-toggle-track .ds-toggle-knob { transform: translateX(16px); } .ds-toggle-label { font-size: 14px; color: oklch(25% 0.01 265); user-select: none; }

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Initials-based avatar in Calm Blue tint, circular.
components.css: .ds-avatar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; background: var(--color-accent-100); color: var(--color-accent-700); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: Floating notification with overlay shadow and ring border.
components.css: .ds-toast { max-width: 384px; padding: 12px 16px; background: white; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); font-size: 14px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(25% 0.01 265); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

narrative.overview: Campbooks feels like a well-organized desk belonging to someone competent and unhurried. Everything has its place, but nothing is fussy. The owner knows where things are and can reach for them without looking. It's clean but lived-in — not a showroom, not a mess. The system uses a restrained palette anchored by a single calm blue accent (hue 265 in OKLCH) and warm-tinted neutrals. It's flat at rest with paper-thin elevation where layering is needed. Corners are softly rounded (8px standard). Typography relies on the system font stack — nothing decorative, nothing that draws attention to itself. This system explicitly rejects Outlook's toolbar density, enterprise SaaS jargon, and fintech sterility.
keyCharacteristics: Single calm blue accent carrying ≤10% of any screen — its restraint is the point
Paper-like cards with thin gray borders and the faintest shadow
14px base size — compact but readable, respecting the owner's time
Clean, precise interactions: fast transitions, crisp focus rings, deliberate hover states
Progressive density: calm at the dashboard, richer in email and document detail views

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The Calm Blue accent appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If a screen feels colorful, something is wrong.

rules.name: The Semantic Restraint Rule
rules.body: Red, green, amber, and blue are reserved for status communication (priority, approval state, errors). Never use them decoratively.

rules.name: The System Stack Rule
rules.body: Never load custom web fonts. The system font stack is faster and feels native to the user's device.

rules.name: The 14px Baseline Rule
rules.body: Body text is 0.875rem (14px). This is deliberate: compact enough for data-dense screens while remaining readable. Bump to 16px only in long-form reading contexts.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, modal overlay). An element with a permanent prominent shadow is a bug.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed primarily through thin gray borders (border border-gray-200), not shadows. The shadow is the second signal, not the first.

dos: Do use the Calm Blue accent on ≤10% of any screen. Buttons, links, focus rings. Not backgrounds, not dividers, not decoration.
Do use semantic colors only for status. A red badge means danger or high priority. A green badge means done.
Do start with the system font stack. No custom web fonts unless there's a specific reason.
Do keep cards flat at rest. Shadows are for hover and overlay states.
Do use the border-first approach to depth: thin gray-200 borders define surfaces; the shadow is secondary.
Do write interface copy that sounds like a person: 'No emails need follow-up' not 'Zero actionable items detected.'
Do keep the dashboard calm. Urgency (red badges, warnings) is reserved for genuinely urgent things.
donts: Don't use Outlook-level density. If a screen has more than 4 distinct action areas, split it.
Don't use enterprise SaaS jargon in labels, buttons, or empty states. 'Processed' not 'Ingestion pipeline complete.'
Don't use navy-and-gold, pure black, or sterile white as neutrals. The grays are tinted toward the accent hue.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards. The Stat component's 4px left border is the sole exception; do not replicate the pattern elsewhere.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left). Use transform and opacity only.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, or decorative blur effects.
Don't wrap everything in a card. Items that don't need elevation should live directly on the page.
